S.FORM: == Aaron Jordan Bramlett == siwkay niza 1 bulad 10 demiad, 1977 a mihca, A. J. Bramlett, miunduay. u biluwa'-mali a mimaliay, 1999 a mihca sa , micumud ciniza i Kelifulan team sanay. A. J. Bramlett nalecuhan i DeKalb, Illinois, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. u sulit nu Hulam šļěŚÄę¬∑ŚĖ¨šłĻ¬∑ŚłÉśčČŚßÜŤźäÁČĻ(Aaron Jordan Bramlett),ÁāļÁĺéŚúčNBA NBA . kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu

S.FORM: == Aaron Jordan Bramlett == siwkay niza 1 bulad 10 demiad, 1977 a mihca, A. J. Bramlett, miunduay. u biluwa'-mali a mimaliay, 1999 a mihca sa , micumud ciniza i Kelifulan team sanay. A. J. Bramlett nalecuhan i DeKalb, Illinois, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. u sulit nu Hulam šļěŚÄę¬∑ŚĖ¨šłĻ¬∑ŚłÉśčČŚßÜŤźäÁČĻ(Aaron Jordan Bramlett),ÁāļÁĺéŚúčNBA NBA . kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu
